brand.name: Local Video Draft Machine
brand.positioning: A practical content operations system that proves draft-to-MP4 quality locally before publishing integrations are added.

sceneStyles.hook: fast title resolve, accent rail, early proof cue
sceneStyles.explain: steady copy reveal with progress bar
sceneStyles.proof: structured point card with status marker
sceneStyles.close: calm final slate with direct next action

audio.placeholder: Generated sine-tone guide track so MP4s are playable before final narration.
audio.mixNotes: Final publish audio should replace tones with voiceover and keep music below speech.

captions.style: concise sidecar SRT plus large in-video text

YouTube Shorts.captionStyle: searchable title with direct learning promise

qualityBar: Every package can be reviewed without opening source code.
Every package includes visual, motion, audio, caption, metadata, and platform decisions.
Every generated MP4 is playable locally and tied back to its package manifest.
Every generated video has a thumbnail, preview frame, and review-board entry.
